fields.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section, docs/reference/system-landscape.md, and llms.txt to reflect the _PLUGIN_ROOT convention, the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ markdown reference pattern, and the check-plugin-self-ref.sh enforcement hook. Do NOT document any annotation or suppression mechanism — there is none.
**Why**: Future agents and developers need accurate documentation of the new conventions.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md, docs/reference/system-landscape.md, llms.txt — existing docs that become stale after this epic
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents the _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern for scripts and _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH derivation for git commands
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents that the enforcement hook blocks ALL plugins/dso references with no suppression mechanism
- When this story is complete, docs/reference/system-landscape.md Plugin Distribution Boundary section accurately reflects that plugin files must not hardcode the install path
- When this story is complete, llms.txt includes entries for the enforcement hook at .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh

## Considerations

- Do NOT document plugin-self-ref-ok — this concept does not exist
- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting
